items.title: Exhibit 10 deal for Nate Bittle with Raptors.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Exhibit 10 deal for Nate Bittle with Raptors.

Reminder: There will be a bunch of these between now and season. Gets them in the system, option to keep or convert them to 2-way later, or he gets an elevated salary if he makes it to Raptors 905.
